summary: Live text and image usage display contracts now require Codex OAuth-shaped image confirmation with apiKeyRequired false and confirmation evidence bound to the same provider job. The Generate stage now mirrors confirmed Codex OAuth image billing records into project artifact storage before generation, local project folder export includes those project-scoped browser artifact writes, and Lane D shows real image latency/count display, but no packaged-app run has captured the pre-generation confirmation JSON from the same run.
